element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic punch/kick combat against street criminals
Alternative playstyle with different move set; allies with Spider-Man despite rivalry
Basic enemy type; hundreds encountered throughout
Fixed locations within levels; unlock summoned hero assistance
Captain America, Black Cat, Iron Fist, Cloak & Dagger, Deathlok, Morbius, Firestar; effectiveness varies by character who summoned them
Leader of villain team; escaped symbiote threat; final boss
Former Hobgoblin transformed; demon-powered; mini-boss encounter
Six-armed Spider-Man clone; restrained and employed by Carnage
Degraded clone; final member of Carnage's team
Carnage's criminal empire base; final level area

typical_relief_triggers: Summoning allied heroes for temporary assistance
Clearing enemy waves in a room
Reaching safe zones between action areas
typical_tension_triggers: Mini-boss villain confrontations (Shriek, Demogoblin, Doppelganger, Carrion)
Wave-based enemy spawning in city areas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Repetitive wave-based combat with episodic pacing; tension builds through villain hierarchy introduction, with boss encounters punctuating standard enemy-clearing sections

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden power-up items in fixed level locations; discovering these unlocks summoned hero aids

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic combat mechanics; street criminals with limited AI; establishes Spider-Man/Venom playstyle differences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Lieutenant villains introduced (Shriek, Demogoblin, Doppelganger); enemy variety increases; players must locate hidden summoning items
difficulty_curve.late_game: Carnage confrontations escalate; full villain team assembled; sewer levels; final epic battle with Carnage and complete team
notable_spikes: First encounter with Carnage (forces Spider-Man and Venom into alliance)
Final Carnage battle (entire villain team present)

notable_level_patterns.description: City areas where Carnage attacks and inspires criminal activity; players battle street criminals in waves
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early city levels during Carnage's initial onslaught

notable_level_patterns.description: Story-driven levels where Carnage recruits lieutenants (Shriek joins, Demogoblin gains demonic power, Doppelganger captured, Carrion hired)
Criminal empire base levels; Carnage's operational center; leads to final confrontation
Levels where summoned heroes are deployed after power-up collection; Spider-Man and Venom recruit resistance
Standard beat-em-up format (similar to Double Dragon/Final Fight); player advances right while clearing enemy waves

sources_used: wikipedia: Spider-Man and Venom: Maximum Carnage
